title: Bow Charge Indicator
description: A colorful bow charge indicator that shows your bow’s power level with vibrant colors.
body:
## 📖 Description

**ThunderDeath’s Bow Charge Indicator Pack ⚡**

This resource pack adds a **colorful bow charge indicator** to Minecraft, making it easier to know exactly how much your bow is charged.
Instead of guessing, you can now see **clear color changes** that represent the charging stages of your bow.

---

### ✨ Features

* 🎯 **Color Indicator for Bow Charge** – Bow charge level is displayed with different vibrant colors.
* 🌈 **Easy to Read** – No need to guess, colors show exactly how powerful your shot will be.
* ⚡ **Lightweight & Lag-Free** – No performance impact, works smoothly.
* 🏹 **PvP & Survival Friendly** – Perfect for both casual play and competitive PvP.
* 🔄 **Compatible with Latest Minecraft Versions**

---

### 🛠️ How it Works

* Start charging your bow → colors will shift as the power increases.
* Release at the right time with the color you want.
* Helps with **perfect timing, PvP accuracy, and overall gameplay.**

---

### 📌 Credits

Pack created by **ThunderDeath ⚡**
